review_text: We stayed on a caravan site and enjoyed our stay. Facilities were very clean and the caravan park backed onto a leash free beach. Very happy pooch. The only downer was the weather.
Nice park busy on weekends good beach
the most amazing sunrise where our campsite was...
Great caravan park and cabin.
Great spot and very good facilities.

Hi 👋 There
So I just spend a few days at the NRMA Toowoon bay holiday park
It was a good few day
Quite place
All sites are powered with water
I liked the ground mesh to walk for each site
The Laundry 🧺 & toilet block look clean & fresh ( been renovated lately)
Close to the beach’s with Cafes & shop down the road

bit crowded..
but it is the school holidays plus have been changed the premium rate
Great spot though... very multi cultural
Second time here ... hopefully catch a fish or two.

Had such a relaxing stay at Toowoon Bay Holiday Park. The beach view was beautiful, with the calming sound of waves adding to the overall serenity. Perfect place to unwind, disconnect, and just enjoy nature. Definitely a peaceful getaway worth coming back to.
Fantastic Park with clean facilities,  easy access to beach and great pool
No club house and shop shuts early

I had a powered site for 2 weeks, the park is immaculate, nobody could fault it.
Amenities are new,laundry new and always clean, lots to do and pancake van on weekend, fisho fresh seafood van visits. Too much else to list, google it.
My only concern was kids...mainly...riding ev scooters and bikes way too fast.
One night a few raced around till 10pm, banging up and down gutters.
Management nipped that in the bud quickly.
Rules are to keep people safe and enjoy their time .
E scooters and bikes are not allowed and is clearly stated in the welcome paperwork.
Thats just a heads up, Management can't keep an eye on every individual.
Oh yea, dog shiits, some owners don't pick up....i won't write my view on that topic.
Staff are friendly and helpful, they seem to enjoy their work which shows.
I can't comment on rooms or service didn't use them.
Visit once, you'll go again.
I'll be back next year.

I hate doing reviews like this but it needs to be said so others with families can make informed decisions. Initial booking process was easy and went smoothly. Communication was great considering the night before a burst water pipe had flooded the site I was on but they offered an alternative site which still included the water views I wanted & had booked. ||Negatives- the sites are crammed in, luckily for me the site next to me(my original site) was vacant due to burst water main, but if someone was there, my electrical cord would have run through their campsite which to me would have been annoying either way. |This spot wasn’t secure, right next to the gates that give you access to Toowoon bay carpark/ beach path. It isn’t locked and anyone can get in the gates,  not to mention the fences are low anyhow so anyone can jump them, giving you the feeling of not feeling safe with your belongings on view and exposed to anyone waking in the gate day or night..Carpark noise on weekends is hectic with cars revving and drunken youths. Obviously not the parks fault but better maintained security with the fences and gates would make you feel less vulnerable. ||Park facilities- amenities are not very clean, may have been because it was busy but in saying that it shouldn’t matter. Pool was dirty and smelt weird, even my little grandkids noticed the smell. Didn’t smell like chlorine just a weird smell. The pool was overcrowded which considering they jam people in doesn’t surprise me. Maybe it’s better when it’s not a weekend. |Overall park looks run down and in need of a makeover. Another issue was on the second day two workers were whipper snipping and marking out the already cramped sites, I feel if you know that site is booked you should have that maintenance done prior to someone being on site. We had to move whilst this worker was whipper snipping which was an inconvenience at the time. The most annoying part was when the two workers decided to sit down next to us and proceed to talk about their lives, and complaints with every second work being foul language, now I’m not a Karen but I had two young grandkids who said the men  are saying the F- word and C word. Not appropriate at all. ||On the Friday we went to get icecreams after our swim, the lady who was in the office on her own didn’t look like she wanted to be there with our interaction being one of inconvenience to her, she was quiet rude and abrupt and complained about the managers to me saying how she was too busy to be dealing with this on her own. No smile just a very unhappy looking worker. That Friday night a group of campers turned up at 11pm at night setting up camp, the noise, swearing and loud music woke us all up & the noise continued until 1am. I feel there should be a cut off time for people to be entering the park to setup,  like 10pm is an appropriate cutoff time, again I don’t mind noise, it’s a caravan park, music at an appropriate level and happy chatter is fine. What’s not acceptable is people arguing and making so much noise with no care for others which I feel would have been prevented if there was a cut off time for checking into site to set up camp. ||Would I be back, that’s a no, so many other parks with cleaner facilities, Happy workers  and a much better holiday vibe for the price. Very disappointing we ended our stay with one night left to stay, just wasn’t up for another night of shenanigans.
A nice caravan park on a beach. It's big. In peak time very packed and typically overcrowded. In a nice location though. If you can go outside holiday times.
Parked RV very friendly staff great location 👍
Busy but good location...
Big park right on beach. Had quite a hike over sand hill to get there.

Great location next to Toowoon Bay Beach and Shelley Beach with a short walk down dune paths or steps near either end of park. Large attractive park with plenty of cabins and sites. Very good amenities as well as jumping pillow and resort style pool. Would have given 5 stars but feel pool wasn't cleaned during our 4 day stay with lots of leaves and sand on the bottom of the pool. You also couldn't see last few pool steps so these may need some sort of paint to show step edges.  Would also be nice to have the odd food truck on a weekday too rather than just weekend. Price is extremely reasonable compared to other local parks. We would definitely stay again.
Powered site. Great facilities. Excellent place

We booked a oceanview cabin no 38 which has a ramp rather than stairs.
Perfect for someone with mobility issues...and ocean views  from inside and the balcony ,breathtaking !!!
It made a very special holiday,one we won't forget and we will be back .❤️
Great park, excellent facilities, excellent location. No WiFi service unless in the camp kitchen. Other than that.....perfect.
Nice park with good access to the beautiful beach. We had an ensuite caravan site. The site was a bit tight to get into but the ensuite was clean and modern.
we just stayed 4 nights on a site - They are a great size, not on top of each other and great facilities. Loved every moment spent here, we couldn't fault it at all. Definitely will be back.

We stayed in a Beachcomber Oceanview cabin. Cabin itself was good with great modern kitchen. Oceanview was a stretch as you could only see the ocean from one corner of the deck. We appreciated the playground (regular swing would be great) and pool area. Jumping pillow had an out of service sign for all 4 days we stayed (despite it only raining 1.5 of those days). On last morning I asked reception if we could use it as it seemed odd - the receptionist seemed oblivious and called the maintenance guy who said yes - it was almost like they didn't bother to open it each day.
The description promised Foxtel and wifi in the cabin - absolutely no wifi connectivity and 1 Foxtel channel - totally disappointing and not as advertised. Beds average and of the 10 pillows in the cabin, only one wasnt stiff and too tall. Staff seemed angry/ sharp at both interactions we had and weren't welcoming. Smoking being allowed on balconies that drifts onto your eating area was not great and "path" to beach has eroded wood that has turned into hurdles - not easily accessible. Overall, it seemed like an okay park and we liked the location for what we needed nearby. We wouldn't rush back to an Oceanview Beachcomber cabin that over promises and under delivers.
Great place and friendly people

We stay regularly for our yearly school holiday trip. It’s a great spot and we love it and the closeness to the beach and other amenities, but we are somewhat underwhelmed in some aspects.

Firstly, we are long standing nrma members and we were not advised of the change and have been advised now we cant use our discount on our current stay even though we paid in full after the change over.

Secondly: from our last stay to this we have noticed a decline in maintenance. The amenities on the cnr of 15th and 17th needs some urgent tlc. Doors don’t lock, soap dispensers don’t work, and hygiene overall seems lacking. According to the cleanliness sign off sheet it appears only 1 clean and a spot check - this is not enough in peak season. I query if any park staff actually care to visit just to understand the lack of cleanliness and hygiene between these cleans.  Reinstate the outdoor beach showers to avoid dirt/sand build up in the shower block.

The powered site mats don’t seem to be replaced, our site has had the same large growing hole in it two years in a row. Covered by a simple plastic vinyl square as a short term fix.

The hot food stall near the jumping castle needs a clean. The sight of the growing old oil cans is very off putting and needs a presentation cleanup.

Overall room for improvement especially from a large commercial private chain now titled as NRMA. Saying all, we will be back.
Great place friendly atmosphere great for the whole family

Stayed on the Ensuite Site and the park does not disappoint, was school holidays, so yes busy with kids running around but yet great atmosphere and well placed bins around the park.  Friendly staff as well. All up great atmosphere and location.  Lost one star because this is the first ensuite site that I have stayed on that hasn't have towels provided.  Sorry, apart from that, lovely.
It was a beautiful park close to the beach the cabins were nice inside and out. But the bed sheets were really dirty
Great large park right on the beach. We had a powered site and the amenity block close by was modern and clean.

Great prompt customer service. Tourist information available as well as local dining. Great powered sites tariff rates. Sites need some TLC and annex mats are not level, worn, torn and a trip hazard. BBQ areas and seating are situated throughout the park. The camp kitchen is large and well stocked with appliances. Some amenities have been updated whilst one is in need of a good makeover. The pool, children's playground and jumping castle are well maintained. Pet friendly although the keep dogs on leash within the park rule is not policed enough. Secure with boomgate entrance and exit.

Staying in the cabins above the beach is great, close to everything.
Quick check-in and check-out.
Close to shopping, clubs and beaches.
Great caravan park for all ages. Highly recommended 👌
Excellent accommodation (we stayed in a Pelican cabin), great value, friendly & helpful customer service, beautiful location.

Such a lovely park. We’ve been holidaying here for the last 3 years and love our stays. The cabins are very well maintained and the park is looked after. The staff are friendly and they are great at enforcing the rules when required. The proximity to the beach and local cafes is so perfect. There’s endless entertainment for the kids and adults alike.
Lovely large electric pitch, great pool and some of the best shower blocks we’ve come across on our travels in Australia.

Had a lovely site for our van, close to amenities and beach access!

Pool was great too!

Caravan Park is located on the beach which is patrolled and has a little cafe however the milkshakes and coffee were average. ||The sites at the park are spacious with plenty of room to accommodate large vans. ||Surprisingly quiet for the amount of people staying in the park with their fur friends. ||Good pool area with a lazy river and an area sectioned off for smaller children. ||The park offers food trucks and alike such as the Keg Combi which is very popular so get there early it’s a good place to mingle with other holiday makers.

Would I come again, yes!

Great beachside location, friendly staff, super clean amenities.

Well organised facility

An Absolutely lovely holiday park to visit & stay , great access to the beach , beautiful views too , great facilities,  awdum playground for the kids & well located , we were walking distance to the local fish n chip shop & the surf club & 5 minutes away from The Entrance, highly recommended 😀 cheers 🍻
Good spot, gets busy of course. Next to the beaches, clean and tidy! We camped, all amenities we're great.

The ocean view cabin we stayed in had everything we needed.
Good amenities for children.
We were lucky to see whales from our balcony?

Beautiful park, clean amenities ities, lots of shady sites, and right on the water - Toowoon Bay, and Shelley Beach.
Great park for families, and dogs - Shelley Beach  is leash free for dogs.
Stayed on a powered site with our caravan. Bathrooms are the cleanest I have seen in many a caravan park. Staff were extremely accommodating and just an all round lovely time at this venue
Tudo maravilhoso 🔝🔝
Plenty of caravan sites, large sites too
A great park right on the beach - good facilities and lovely staff. It was great to be able to take our puppies for a walk on the beach and it was very quiet or sleeping.

I had a great experience with the activities and overall the pelican cabin was awesome. Although the Wi-Fi is pretty bad (please fix it), some good cafes and restaurants I love it (jumping pillow was deflated which was pretty disappointing and the tricycles where sold out but it was okay) definitely coming back
Regards
A Guest
Great spot for a getaway
Fantastic service the biggest sites brilliant brand new amenities

So peaceful!  The cabin was first class with lots of space, comfortable beds and a kitchen that you can either cook in or serve up finger food conveniently. The view off of a large covered deck was  of the ocean and neighbours although there weren't able to be seen or heard!
Home away from home

staying here till the end of the month have to say the staff are very friendly and helpful the park is well  kept and clean the rates are reasonable we are very happy with this great park I highly recommend it to all travelers
Always a pleasure to stay close to  everything you need and do
Staff are rude and unprofessional

On arrival didn't feel like a really nice welcome I acctully felt awkward.  Then when we drove down to our cabin everything looked lovley except few miner things had no tea towel to dry anything had to go bye one then the spa bath jets 1 didn't work and had no pressure at all it was used once and that was it . There were also mould on the blinds in the dinning area. The cabin needs a bit of an update also the bbq on the varendah we went to cook a bbq and the bbq did not work we then had to walk to another bbq also the gate to the beach was open one day and the next when my husband and kids came bk from the beach the gate was closed and they couldn't get bk in no gate code was given they had to then walk right around after an ordeal with e men in the bush near the gate and toilet. Wasn't impressed for the 2 days we were there. Otherwise  the surrou rings and places are great veryy disappointed.

Great place, perfect location to the beach. Don't expect to
stay for an extended break if caravan or camping. You can only stay there for a max of 42 nights per calendar year. Even if the park is empty. With a housing crisis at the moment, I find it quite pathetic.
Wonderful place cabins very nice

We stayed one night here prior to flying out of Sydney Airport (1.5hr drive) the next afternoon.

We arrived a little late due to the horrendous weather and road closures, however the after hours check in was simple and straight forward.
We were on an ensuite powered site which we thought was absolutely fantastic. We were able to freshen up before the flight and not have to worry about sharing amenities.
There was a mat on the ground which meant we weren’t trampling mud into the rented Campervan which made a big difference the next day when returning.

The Holiday Park was right on the beach so you could be on the sand within 2 minutes. Within half hour walk, we made it to Shelly Beach Surf club where we were able to grab a takeaway coffee for the walk back. We didn’t try the food but it looked great.

Checking out was also very simple, even though we had discarded our code so reception had to let us out!

The only downside is that we didn’t stay longer!! Maybe next time.

Beautiful Holiday Park
We had a wonderful little breakaway
Our Grandchildren Enjoyed the amenities and had loads of fun.
Will definitely visit again.
Great spot on the beach
Excellent Holiday Park, we had ensuite caravan site which was large, fairly level and had sea views. Park is very big and would get busy holiday times.

Beautiful spot near the ocean, great if you have a dog as there is a dog beach here. Nice morning walk also.
We have our own van so can’t comment on other rooming but has a pool area and kids play area.

They say they are pet-friendly - but only allow one dog per site. Many people have more than one dog. We have two small dogs and they said the only way to book was to hire 2 sites. Hardly "pet friendly ".
Sehr schöner Campingplatz

We had a fantastic mini break over Anzac long weekend. The location is so central to shops and activities but quiet enough you can hear the ocean at night and birds sing. Kids loved the pedal cars, jumping pillow and pool. We love that it’s a dog friendly park and the beach is dog friendly too! The bathrooms and kitchen facilities were always clean and tidy. We had a great stay and will be back!
We had a lovely stay, lovely park plenty of amenities, great pool and barbys
Golf trip. Typical caravan park. Lots of kids. BBQ facilities in cabins, nice beds, balconies, communal spaces etc.

When I booked with reception they said they had no concrete slab only nice grassy blocks.|Upon arriving on our block we had hardly any grassy and mainly dirt. The block had a mat down that had big holes in it and we were 12 metres from the skip bins that hadn't been emptied in over a week. The smell was like rotton seafood and wafted inside our van and onto the washing I put out.|Upon calling reception I was told by Reece's we know it smells but the Cleanaway truck has broken down,it's not our fault. Firstly why would they put anyone on that block?|And secondly cleanaway has a fleet of trucks!|While waiting for my husband to use the men's,  the cleaning gentleman came along to do the ladies block and had finished in seven minutes,  no wonder they smell. The toilets near us were old. And run down.|The park has mainly permanents and a lot of the cabins are run down and shabby.|The pool looked green!|There were signs up advertising a pancake man but no date ever as to when and they were also advertising Australia day. .in march|All in all a bad experience but the beach below is beautiful and if you score a seaside block views are great.|Disappointed at the two calls to the office,and the staffs response finally was we can move you ,with one day to go.|Who wants to then pull their annexe down and move.|Won't be back,  blue lagoon park much better-|.

1When we booked Toowoon bay they said they had no concrete slab,but they said they had nice grassy sites.
When we arrived our site had hardly any grass,mainly dirt. There was a mat on our site with big holes in it and we were 12 metres from a skip bin that hadn't been emptied in over a week. The smell was like rotten seafood and wafted inside our van and onto the washing I had put out.We rang the office and eventually was told by Reece,that they know it smells but it's not their fault as the Cleanaway truck broke down. Firstly why would you put anyone on the block as other people told it had been like it since the weekend 4 days ago and secondly Cleanaway trucks has a fleet of trucks.
The park has mainly permanents and many cabins are shabby and run down.While waiting for husband to have a wash,observed a older gentleman close the ladies off to clean them .I guarantee he had finished in 7 minutes while i was still waiting for my husband,no wonder they smell. The toilet block near us was old and dirty.There were signs advertising pancakes,no date or time and never seen any pancakes also a sign advertising Australia day in March. The beach below was beautiful and if you manage to score a seaside block  you will have a lovely view
All in all very disappointed that we couldn't even sit outside all the time we were there and disappointed at the no help from the staff. Pool looked green.They did offer to move us on the last day ,who wants to pack up then,wont be back

Huge holiday park located at Toowoon Bay. All the amenities you would look for in a holiday park and more. The amenities were immaculately clean and accessed with security codes. The pool and playground areas were well appointed and safety requirements fully met.
The aircon was on when we arrived,  we could here the ocean at night we were that close, very happy with the stay, clean , swimming pool,  beach access all awesome thankyou.
I lived in the here and it's my go-to place to stay when I visit.  Can't put a value on walks around the breaches.

A lovely park with a great location but maintenance is lacking, there are a number of old permanent vans that are an eyesore, but what really spoiled our stay was an overzealous worker who shouted at us to slow down every time we drove in or out of the park. The speed limit is 10kph, which we stuck to.  On one occasion both the car speedometer and the GPS recorded 9kph, but that did not stop this aggressive self-important fool from telling us "the speed limit is 10, not 50kph". I suggest this guy invests in a radar to see what speed guests are actually doing and a course in customer service and anger management!
All good except wifi doesn't work.
Dog friendly, and right on the beach.
Great caravan park
Great place to put the van for a few days and just do alot or nothing at all

Some of the staff aka 'Jenny' should really learn how to treat and speak to their customers. I didn't appreciate the way I was treated or spoken to by this staff member. After driving 6 plus hrs with my children only to treated the way we were is unacceptable. Didn't stay the 2 nights we paid for ( wasn't in the holiday park more then 20 minutes.. told no refunds were to be given!

I stand firm on this review!!!
Great caravan park with separate accommodations available
Amazing atmosphere for the kids at this place through the holidays. We were very happy staying here through the summer holidays with our family AND dog. Very friendly service! Clean amenities.

We went for one night with our kitted out van and took the dog, it's dog friendly, one dog per site. The park was really clean, great facilities, awesome pool and backs right onto an awesome dog beach! Will definitely be back! 😁
Great spot near the beach! We were at the end of the park, so it was only a 2 minute walk to the beach. Lovely fish and chips place also very close by.

We stayed in the beachcomber cabin which was lovely but very very over priced. ||There is no internet or phone reception , the cabin was for 6 people  but only provided things for 4 people “like towels and plates. ||Ants everywhere. Not many activities and beach is very rough so can’t swim there.||Some parts of the park look very run down like refugee camps. For $4500 ( 6 nights ) definitely not work it. ||We left the room at 10 on the dot but lost all access therefore had to reception to get us out. ||Won’t be staying there again .

For what we paid, I expected more, such as basic requirements. Staff were rude. The place was infested with ants and bugs, hardly any towels and cutlery inside the cabin. No wifi or phone reception. Will not be coming back here again. Some parts of the park looked like I was in a 3rd world country.
Been coming back for a few years the staff you couldn't folt they are so helpful 5 star
What a place great to unwind great for the whole family 10 🌟
Awesome place
Best dg beach on the NSW Central Coast

Lots of fun in the pool and at the beach!
Boys stayed busy the whole time and made some friends as well.

Not a bad place. Just went to see a friend.
Kids went for a swim and we had a bqq.
It's a clean park, staff on the Golf buggies are a bit over the top with the kids. But i guess that's the rules that the owners have set and they have to enforce them like police... close to the beach, you can also get a really nice spot over looking the water if you get in early.

Best caravan park in the world once you come to grips with the fact that rabbits secretly run the park.. Little buggers are everywhere. They are clearly colluding with the magpies to keep the pool clean and grounds mowed.
If you have kids, consider them permanently occupied.

We stay here in our van, hence no room review, however they look fabulous! This park is clean, and well run. Bordering the beach ⛱️ is a bonus, and it's DOG FRIENDLY 🐕! Yay!
We highly recommend this park. 👌
Best place ever
What a great caravan park, had a great weekend camping there. Lovely staff, clean facilities, a great beach, pet friendly.
Le calme, la propreté des sanitaires
Great park, and the amenities were very clean. Staff friendly and the pool was great.

We have returned to Toowoon Bay Holiday Park for a second time and will return again in the future. We have friends in the area and the park is well situated for us. We enjoy our morning walks around the area with a number of places offering good food and coffee. Be a dog friendly park is always welcome especially when it's close to a dog friendly beach as well. Double jackpot. 👌🐕
Location is fantastic.  Cafes only 500m walk and beach even closer.  Amenities are well looked after.
We love this place

Great family get away. Facilities are complete with all amenities, clean and well kept. There crew with leaf lowers cleaning decks walkways and roads right now
Kids playground, big pool with kiddy wading pool and big shared kitchen I'm staying in. Pelican cabin with 4 kids: rooms with two doh le bunks. Perfect size since we spend all day outside anyway.
On the edge of Toowoon bay just north of Bateau Bay. Walk ways to the beach. Wonderful amenities, camp kitchen, playground, generous pool. Great holiday stay.

We didn't get to explore the whole park as we were down for a quick trip, for price I was shocked at how good the cabins were! We will be staying here from now on when we have to travel, hopefully next time we can explore the whole place!
Great park, walk straight down onto dog beach. Amenities are renovated and modern, extremely clean 👍👍

Nothing but the best, I have a on-site caravan up here and enjoy coming up in the summertime for a quick, cheap, and easy get away. Within the park, it has such a warm and special environment, suitable for everyone. The park is kid and family friendly with many attractions for both the big kids and small kids! Perfect, for a simple and easy holiday getaway with the kids.
awesome, Great Place
Fantastic place to holiday.  The beaches are easily accessible and convenient and the place was amazing to stay at

BBQ didn’t work, stovetop pathetic & cheap and nasty frypan . Mould in bathroom & blinds throughout unit . Dont give me u should have let us know & we could have fixed it .  IBIS 3 . You’re maintenance people could spend the week fixing it up . Only modern thing was a new toilet, can’t imagine how bad the old 1 was .  Pity , lovely spot .

Absolutely love the place I call it home away from home

Summer bay haha

We stayed in one of the jerbra cabins. They are modern, comfortable, clean and in excellent condition. The location is fantastic, we're right near the beach, there are BBQs right outside, and the price was reasonable. It's a beautiful little place. I'll definitely be back!
The park and cabin's have just been fully renovated to 5star with quality appliances and finishes  right on the beach with extra large patio  and built in BBQ fully undercover

I go to parks quite a lot. This one is pretty low on the user friendly side. Upon arrival a/h immediately annoyed standing at the wrong safe. Then 10 attempts trying to open the right one. Then driving around using a poor/inaccurate map.
Then I take a trip back to 1980 with codes on the facility doors, I mean really how many people at the park aren't allowed to go to the toilet?
And finally, how much does it really cost for coat hooks? I'm sick of trying to hang a towel, bag, clothes, shoes etc off 1 frigging hook... there is a small bench, that mid shower is under water, so that's useless.
I am really convinced park owners, have never stayed at a park.

Great overnight stay
Great location
We had a very pleasant stay. Toilets were new and beautiful.  Grass was lovely.  Staff helpful.

Wir waren im März für einige Nächte auf diesem Campingplatz und haben unsere Zeit sehr genossen. Besonders gefiel uns die Lage direkt am Strand und auch der Pool unter der Woche. Am Wochenende wurde der Platz sehr sehr voll und demnach auch der Pool. Leider wurde die Pflege der Sanitätanlagen nicht nachgekommen. Das war wirklich schade, denn sonst ein schöner Platz. In fussläufiger Nähe gibt es ein wunderbares und sehr leckeres Café direkt am Strand.
Awesome place to stay come here every year
Thank you guys, they were very accommodating despite we are a very disorganised family haha. Thank you for great service 😊

Dieser Campingplatz hat uns persönlich nicht sehr gefallen. Die Lage ist wirklich toll und der Strand wunderschön. Die Sanitäranlagen waren aber wirklich grenzwertig. Scheinbar wird daran gerade gearbeitet denn ein Sanitärgebäude war wegen Bauarbeiten geschlossen. Wir teilten uns also das alte verbliebene mit vielen Campern die sonst das andere benutzt hätten.

Am schlimmsten fand ich den schwarzen Schimmel an den Wänden und der Decke und diesen mysteriösen Zwischenraum zwischen den Herren und Frauenduschen. Scheint ein Lager oder sowas zu sein. Die Tatsache das man durch die Löcher Filmen könnte fand ich sehr unangenehm (geht aber vielleicht nur mir so).

Für Menschen die 185cm lang sind, sind die Duschtüren ganz schön klein. Ich konnte beim Duschen in den Spiegel des Flures schauen...

Wie gesagt, scheinbar wird renoviert (ich hoffe auch das alte Sanitärgebäude)...

Der Platz selbst war groß genug für ein Wohnmobil, auch wenn wir etwas kreativ stehen mussten da unser Kabel nicht bis zum Anschlusspunkt reichte.

Den Pool haben wir nicht genutzt, er war uns persönlich zu voll (Kinder).

Der etwas steile Zugang zum Strand war nicht zu lang und dort konnte man schöne Bilder machen und die Steinformationen am Boden bewundern. Hunde sind hier offensichtlich auch erlaubt denn davon waren hier viele.

Achja, negativ blieb mir noch ein männlicher Mitarbeiter in Erinnerung welcher die Toiletten gereinigt hat. Er knallte mit den Türen und den Klobrillen, Wischte den Boden fluchend wie ein Berserker und verschwand innerhalb von 50 Sekunden wieder. Ich saß in diesem Moment auf dem Klo und dachte er tritt gleich die Tür ein...

Er hatte wohl einen schlechten Tag?!
Sauberer wars danach jedenfalls nicht...

I have nothing but positive things to say. We booked a powered site and found everything easy, comfortable and peaceful. Reception staff are amazing. The amenities are clean and well maintained. Washing $4 per load, lots of lines to hang your clothes. At the top of the list for me was security. As a woman alone or as this time with my daughter, I felt very safe. Security codes in and out of the front gate, security codes on amenity doors that change frequently.  We wanted to stay longer but due to circumstances outside of the parks control power was going to be cut for a whole day and we needed access to our computer. Would highly recommend and I will definitely go back.
Excellent place to camp.loved everything about it great friendly staff great ammetaties plenty to do in the park and outside highly recommended.wish I could live there
It is a great camping location.
On google maps, appeared to be a short walk to beach. Instead, steep long walk down and up.
Beautiful location, I loved it

Toller Ort. Wir hatten ein Camp-Site mit Meerblick vom Hügel aus, etwas sehr besonderes. Direkter Strandspaziergang und Sonnenuntergang. Pool, Spielplatz, Jumping-Pillow alles sehr gepflegt, etwas in die Jahre gekommen sind allerdings die Sanitäranlagen, daher nur vier von fünf Punkten.
Love this place. Family friendly and beautiful park

Staff are so helpful and friendly.
Location is perfect for a relaxing time near the sea. Beautiful views from my campsite ammenities were clean and maintained well. Would definitely recommend I will b back. The park being pet friendly is how I discovered this gem

The Beachcomber cabin has great views and is very spacious.  The refurbishment is good although I wouldn't have put the island where it is in the kitchen. It cuts down on the flow. Also there is a double size stove, which is great,  but only 2 cooking pans/saucepans

The amenities were never clean! I was there for 2 nights, and even when the cleaner signed off on cleaning the toilets, they weren't done... when you're paying that much a night, the least you'd expect is toilets you feel comfortable using.
We camped there. Fantastic location and good facilities. Definately will return. Kids had the greatest time.
An awesome place to visit with a great beach very close by, great pool, clean facilities, and a relaxing vibe!
Great place for the family and great for the kids with plenty of calm swimming areas

We stayed in a beach comber cabin and it was excellent. This was our first caravan park stay in a long time. It was very modern and well built, open space living, comfortable and brand named appliances, Eg large Electrolux fridge, 900mm stove, Samsung microwave. After staying at many Airbnb’s, I’m used to ‘hosts’ being very cheap in many ways. The location was second to none, less than a few minutes to the beach, but only a couple of minutes drive to a shopping centre. I was thoroughly impressed with Toowoon Bay Holiday Park and can’t wait to come back

Been staying at this caravan park since I was a kid and now I get to take my own children there to enjoy.
It’s changed a lot over the years, always improving.
I’ve always found Toowoon Bay Holiday Park a safe place for kids to enjoy some autonomy, a very friendly place with lots to do. A short walk to a couple of great beaches, a short drive to the Entrance IFKYK and shops all around.
Would absolutely recommend.
Lovely spot
Nice not too big park with beach access and pool. Good organized camp kitchen.
Great camping site s , but be sure to book
Awesome spot

Stays camping, easy access to beach.
Facilities bbq just around the corner.
Toilets early morning no hot shower running.
Just embraced the cold water running to your body, grrrrrrrrr.
Great place for a children's camp.
Over priced staff rude an ignorant will never go back place filthy

The Beachcomber Ocean view No. 39 appeared to be recently renovated - it was beautiful & spotlessly clean|Very comfortable beds, 2 bathrooms and a spa - it was right on the ocean front but not sure all the other Beachcomber ocean views would have had such a good view - very impressed and nice friendly staff - will definitely come again in the future
Lovely caravan park close to the beach that allowed dogs. Staff very helpful and friendly. Will definitely return. Had a powered site overlooking beach sound of the sea very relaxing.
Great spot for holidaying beach next to it all amenities great for kids

Absolutely disgraceful, rude service at the reception desk. The woman serving this weekend made you feel like a piece of chewing gum on the bottom of her shoe. We have decided we will stay elsewhere in the future.

Beautifully presented, very relaxing holiday park. Great pool, great playground next to excellent camp sites allowing pets, great camp kitchen all next to simply the best dog friendly, beautiful beach I've ever been to. Awesome spot.
Great spot ,has lovely grounds and next to the beach. A range of accommodation options
Pity the sea view was blocked

I have been coming to this holiday park for more then 10 years and this holiday park is getting so old the kids activities use to be so good but now it’s bad only has one pool it’s so tiny like they could add a slide but no the bathrooms are so out dated the play ground is so out dated they could add a slide for the pool fix the playgrounds add better kids activities update the bathrooms so it’s better but I recommend not coming here if you have children they will be so bored nothing to do when I use to come here at the begging was so good I come here and it’s boring everything is good if you want a good holiday park unima beach holiday parks 2 pools best play grounds bathrooms are great and just over all good park umina
Great location, great for families.  Stayed on a powered site. Pool, jumping pillow and playground.  Walking access to surf beach and kid friendly bay.

We stayed on a powered site. The only thing was the amenities were a bit dated. Also the cleaners decided to clean two amenity blocks at the same time, and there was no option to use the disabled toilet. Not good when your daughter really needs the bathroom. Also, not having a toilet in the pool area was annoying. Otherwise a really great park. The pool was great with ample options to relax and keep an eye on the kids.

Toowoon Bay Holiday Park is a paradise for beach lovers, with direct access to the stunning Toowoon Bay Beach. The cabins are spacious and comfortable, and the staff are friendly and helpful. The park has a variety of amenities, including a swimming pool, playground, and camp kitchen, making it a great choice for families. Overall, Toowoon Bay Holiday Park is a fantastic place to stay if you're looking for a relaxing beach vacation.
This was stay 6 great views, cabin was as new every modern conveniences. Will be back asap.
The rooms where great but the most expensive one was a tad small insurgent you should visit during the holidays

Nice park with lots of activities for kids. Alot of sites not long enough for long caravans. Dog off leash beach on doorstep was really good for our staffie. Nice Cafe at Toowoon Beach and Shelley Beach.

Great location close to the beach, clean amenities, always not a good sign when have over bearing terms.and conditions. Park seemed dated and need of an overall tidy up. Very close sites didn't feel overall like a good place to stay unfortunately |

We had the best 3 days trying out our new sprinter...everyone was so lovely..
Loved the ensuite site we will def be back.

Best caravan park by the sea.
Gr8 facilities
Highly recommend 💯%
Great clean and tidy place, great facilities too
Camping facilities are clean and the location is good.
Spectacular. Premium site. Facilities are clean, staff are terrific (said we could check out site before booking). We will be back.
A wonderful place to holiday, so close to the beach.

COUNCIL OWNED - Support local
Charged $55 per night off peak in August for a single grass tent spot with a worn out green mat.

Overcrowded caravan Park with no reception after 6pm, all night until 8am in the morning. Lack of security meant we didn't even feel safe to have a shower or even go to the toilet. Bathroom floors were disgusting and are cleaner at the beach. Even returned to my site to find vomit 🤢 on it from the party go-ers (they let sites have as many occupants, overcrowded 21st birthday parties and even let locals who aren't registered use the pool and playgrounds). So many residents of the caravan park complained to me personally but no one can do anything because there are NO staff after 6pm. When we checked in Brooke the receptionist even said "We're the most expensive caravan park in the area if you're looking for something cheaper there's more down the road" when I asked what their most budget friendly site available costs. We thought by staying here we would feel safer for the additional cost we did not.

P.s. No a single caravan site actually has clear beach views due to fauna regeneration in the area which prohibits the council from cutting down the trees.

Safe travelling to All that read this 🧳🏖

It was such a great little cabin, spa included.|Such a great big park great pools not that we used them.|Great walks to the beach with great access.|The office at the front has lots of bits and pieces |Comfortable bed |It was lovely sitting on the verandah listening to the waves

Such an amazing experience. Great Getaway spot near the beach with nice ensuite cabins. Cabins were clean and well maintained. Exceptional service by Jenny and she was very helpful to resolve a simple issue we had. Will definitely be back for small getaways.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Toowoon Bay Holiday Park. We booked 3 nights in a Prime Tourist Site for our caravan holiday. The staff at reception were very helpful. The grounds and amenities were kept clean and tidy. We walked to nearby Shelly Beach Golf Club and drove to The Entrance Leagues Club and enjoyed delicious meals at both places. In fact, we loved it here so much that we booked in for another stay in December!

We camped here on a powered ensuite site with our RTT setup. Absolutely gorgeous and convenient. Dog friendly, family friendly with plenty of kids safely moving around the campground, loved the food stalls on Sunday morning, the beach access is a few minutes away.

Just beautiful. So clean and quiet and spacious. And great value for money. Everything was above expectations although the wifi needs improvement. A wonderful stay in a fantastic location. My cabin had a private beach entrance nearby and the birds flitting in the trees were most cheering. Thank you Toowoon Bay Holiday Park!
Park was clean and tidy. Plenty of space and facilities for kids were safe and tidy.

Great service
Huge camp spots
Great amenities
Awesome reception from 2 friendly ladies on our arrival of our maiden trip with our new Crusader Serenity. Facilities very clean
Stayed in a cabin. Very clean and well presented.  Bed Very uncomfortable.  Fantastic location.

Great place to stay! We got a cabin woch was quite cheap...
Only negative was that we got the beach access cabin.., theres no fencing separating our car from people carrying all their beach gear past... wouldnt usually care but we drive a pretty expensive holden so was just unnecessary stress realy....
Other than that... AWSOME place to stay!
Great place for a holiday 😃
What a fantastic  caravan park  ,great for families  and children  and the walking distance to the beach  5 star park.
We love coming every year for the powered ensuite sites. Perfect 🥰
Didn't stay here. Just wandered through to beach. Great little waterfall at the beach with resident eels to feed. Park was very well maintained
